ONE CONSOLIDATED REQUIREMENT PDF FOR MOODLE IMPLEMENTATION REVIEW.
This consolidated PDF is assembled from the Moodle MVP implementation copy. The import_assets folder is excluded. Additional
implementation elements are included with presentation labels cleaned for review.
